TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Azerbaijan, title = Azerbaijan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Azerbaijan} }

S.FORM: Azerbaijan Itini i 40 30 N, 47 30 E, noAsiya ko Azerbaijan. Polong no sekalay i 86,600 sq km "saka 113 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 82,629 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 3,971 sq km " Polong i 9,872,765 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 57.60%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 11.30%, malo no roma to a sera 31.10%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakalima 28 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Ilham Aliyev , patirengan a romi'ad i 2003 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 31 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: a*…ôrb~b~vaijan itini i ** ** n, ** ** …ô, no~uasija ko~u a*…ôrb~b~vaijan. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i **,*** s* km "saka *** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i saka…ĺima ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i i…ĺńßam a…ĺij…ôb~v , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Azerbaijan Itini i 40 30 N, 47 30 E, noAsiya ko Azerbaijan. Polong no sekalay i 86,600 sq km "saka 113 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 82,629 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 3,971 sq km " Polong i 9,872,765 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 57.60%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 11.30%, malo no roma to a sera 31.10%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakalima 28 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Ilham Aliyev , patirengan a romi'ad i 2003 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 31 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i saka…ĺima ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i i…ĺńßam a…ĺij…ôb~v , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
